promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected because the stronger direct TERM_CONFLICT parent for Constraints. Entropy still lacked its own A2-mid child reduction even after the broader warm-cluster contradiction packet.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the exact source-specific contradiction chain: anti-identity inflation, scalar-law jump, path-selection jump, recurrence-to-engine jump, topology forcing, and bundle or Hopf pressure.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: Existing A2-mid contradiction packets and direct contract-side fences were used to keep the reduction source-specific while preventing repetition of the broader warm-cluster packet.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred as the next paired sibling reduction once the stronger Constraints. Entropy parent had its own direct child batch.
Not selected because the stronger term-conflict parent already isolates the needed chain with enough precision for bounded reduction.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent term-conflict batch plus the direct contract-side comparison anchors were sufficient to isolate the reusable chain fences and the remaining quarantined overclaims.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates preserve the strongest source-specific chain fences from the stronger term-conflict parent without reusing the full warm-cluster contradiction packet.
They remain source-linked, proposal-side, and suitable only for later selective comparison or promotion work.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain overclaims, forced-derivation moves, or hidden-formal-leakage residue rather than clean reusable A2-2 packets.
This batch exists to keep those overclaims explicit while preventing them from backflowing into active A2.
